import { identity } from '../util/identity'; import { mapOneOrManyArgs } from '../util/mapOneOrManyArgs'; import { pipe } from '../util/pipe'; import { mergeMap } from './mergeMap'; import { toArray } from './toArray'; export function joinAllInternals(joinFn, project) { return pipe(toArray(), mergeMap(function (sources) { return joinFn(sources); }), project ? mapOneOrManyArgs(project) : identity); } //# sourceMappingURL=joinAllInternals.js.map
